title: Adani Power Limited Updates Contact Details of Key Managerial Personnel - scanx.trade
content:
Adani Power Limited Updates Contact Details of Key Managerial Personnel
Adani Power Limited has updated contact details for its Key Managerial Personnel as per SEBI regulations. The disclosure covers Managing Director Mr. Anil Sardana, CEO Mr. Shersingh Khyalia, CFO Mr. Dilip Kumar Jha, and Company Secretary Mr. Puneet Bansal. The information has been filed with BSE and NSE and updated on the company website.
*this image is generated using AI for illustrative purposes only.
Adani Power Limited has filed updated contact details for its Key Managerial Personnel (KMP) with stock exchanges BSE and NSE, in compliance with regulatory requirements. The disclosure was made pursuant to Regulation 30(5) of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.
Key Personnel Contact Updates
The company has provided updated contact information for four senior executives who are authorized to determine the materiality of events and make disclosures to stock exchanges:
Regulatory Compliance
The updated contact details serve the specific purpose of enabling these Key Managerial Personnel to assess the materiality of events or information and facilitate timely disclosures to stock exchanges. This ensures the company maintains proper communication channels with regulatory authorities and market participants.
Website Update
Adani Power Limited has confirmed that the updated contact information is also being reflected on the company's official website at www.adanipower.com , ensuring transparency and easy access for stakeholders.
The disclosure was signed by Company Secretary Mr. Puneet Bansal and submitted to both BSE (Scrip Code: 533096) and NSE (Scrip Code: ADANIPOWER) for their records.
